goal: 在官网和 README 增加 Hosted Hub 入口

summary.title: Add hosted Hub links to the website
summary.what: Added Hub links to the website header and footer, changed the homepage self-Hub secondary CTA to the GitHub Pages static snapshot, and added both mainline.sh/hub and the GitHub Pages Hub URL to the website README and AI-readable files.
summary.why: After enabling GitHub Pages for the generated Hub, the public website and machine-readable site surfaces needed to expose the same Hub entry points that the product README now references.
summary.user_goal: 在官网和 README 增加 Hosted Hub 入口

decisions.chose: Keep /hub/ as the website navigation and footer target.
decisions.rationale: mainline.sh/hub is already live and belongs naturally inside the website navigation.

decisions.chose: Make the homepage self-Hub secondary CTA point to https://mainline-org.github.io/mainline/.
decisions.rationale: The GitHub Pages static export is now enabled and should be discoverable from the website without replacing the mainline.sh Hub route.

decisions.chose: Add both Hub URLs to src/aiKnowledge.ts, public/llms.txt, and public/llms-full.txt.
decisions.rationale: Search and agent-readable surfaces should learn that Hub is a canonical product surface, not only a homepage button.

decisions.chose: Add the live Hub and GitHub Pages Hub snapshot to the website README.
decisions.rationale: The website repo README should match the product repo README after the hosted Hub rollout.

rejected.alternative: Remove the existing website /hub/ flow and only link to GitHub Pages.
rejected.reason: mainline.sh/hub is already live and useful; the GitHub Pages URL is an additional static snapshot, not a reason to break the website route.

rejected.alternative: Only update visible UI and skip AI-readable files.
rejected.reason: The website has explicit AI-readable knowledge surfaces, so a canonical Hub entry point should be represented there too.

review_notes: Enabled GitHub Pages for mainline-org/mainline with workflow build_type, triggered hub-pages.yml, watched it pass, and verified https://mainline-org.github.io/mainline/ returns HTTP 200.
Ran npm run build: Astro check reported 0 errors, 0 warnings, 0 hints; Astro built 61 pages.
Ran git diff --check and git diff --cached --check.

architectural_claims: The GitHub Pages Hub is a separate static snapshot URL exposed as a secondary product surface.
AI-readable website files should include the same canonical Hub surfaces that the visible UI exposes.
behavioral_changes: Site header and footer now include a Hub link.
Homepage self-Hub section now links both to /hub/ and the GitHub Pages static snapshot.
AI-readable knowledge endpoints and llms files now advertise Hub URLs.
security_implications: No runtime auth or data access behavior changed; this is link/copy metadata plus static navigation.
migration_notes: No content migration required; existing /hub/ generation remains in place.
